narrative.headline: What 2021 Ford Bronco Sport owners report most
narrative.summary: Electrical system failures are the most commonly reported problem, with owners describing sudden instrument cluster shutdowns and inability to start the vehicle. Powertrain and engine complaints follow closely, centered on unexpected stalling and no-start conditions. Brake complaints round out the most-reported issues, with owners noting abnormal squealing noises that appear without warning.

issues.title: Electrical System
issues.blurb: Owners report the instrument cluster going dead and the start button LED flashing repeatedly, leaving the vehicle unable to start despite normal battery voltage · 7 fire · 3 crash

issues.blurb: Owners report the vehicle stalling without warning while driving at low speeds, with no warning lights illuminated prior to the event · 1 fire
